__IMTCONN__.label: My Dark Arts YT Transcript API connection

messages.content:
your job is to extract the video id from a youtube url.

You will provide nothing else than the video id.

For example, if you're given this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QEaEwbYPCAY

Your output would be: QEaEwbYPCAY

messages.content:
YouTube Transcript Summary Prompt

Primary Request:
Please analyze the following YouTube video transcript and provide:
- A concise summary (MAXIMUM 50 words) capturing only the essential points
- 4 key takeaways with relevant emojis

Output Format:
✨ Ultra-Brief Summary: Maximum 50-word overview of the main content

Key Takeaways:
- [emoji] First important point
- [emoji] Second important point
- [emoji] Third important point  
- [emoji] Fourth important point

Please keep all analysis extremely concise and include an appropriate emoji for each bullet point that relates to its content.
